vocab.meaning: phong cảnh đẹp đến ngạt thở
vocab.example: I’ve always dreamed of hiking in the Swiss Alps to feast my eyes on the breathtaking scenery of the snow-capped peaks.
If I had the opportunity, I would love to trek through the untouched wilderness of the Amazon rainforest to reconnect with nature.

vocab.meaning: địa hình gồ ghề, hiểm trở
vocab.example: I'm quite keen on challenging myself by walking across the rugged terrain of the Scottish Highlands.

vocab.meaning: con đường ven biển thơ mộng
vocab.example: Taking a long stroll along an idyllic coastal path in Amalfi would be the perfect way to unwind and soak up the Mediterranean sun.
While I can't literally traverse the globe on foot, I would love to complete a long-distance pilgrimage like the Camino de Santiago.

vocab.meaning: ở nơi hẻo lánh, ít người biết đến
vocab.example: I prefer walking in places that are off the beaten track, far away from the noisy tourist traps of the city.

vocab.meaning: làm mới/phục hồi các giác quan
vocab.example: The crisp morning air and the scent of pine needles in a deep forest would definitely help reinvigorate my senses.

vocab.meaning: phong cảnh đẹp như tranh vẽ
vocab.example: The Lake District in England offers a picturesque landscape that is just ideal for a day-long excursion.

vocab.meaning: sự khám phá tình cờ và thú vị
vocab.example: Walking aimlessly through the ancient streets of Kyoto might lead to a serendipitous discovery of a hidden temple.

vocab.meaning: mở đường cho/tạo điều kiện cho (sự suy ngẫm)
vocab.example: A long, solitary walk in the countryside often paves the way for deep introspection and creative thinking.
